generated_oml:
instance MotorPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor-mounted position encoder for angular position measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorAngularPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder behind gearbox for angular position measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxAngularPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring input current to motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InputCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorAngularPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionEncoder
]

instance GearboxAngularPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryPositionEncoder
]

instance InputCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance MeasuredCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured input current from current sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InputCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTStreamingEnabler, SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance MeasuredTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque derived from current and angular position sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InputCurrentDataTransmitted, MotorAngularPositionDataTransmitted, GearboxAngularPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance MeasuredAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity derived from angular position sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorAngularPositionDataTransmitted, GearboxAngularPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance SimulatedOutputsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Outputs from Simulink simulation models"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DashboardVisualizationEnabler
]

instance SysMLStructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block and Internal Block Diagrams for robot axis structural model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction model in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance StribeckModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance DahlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance LuGreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance AASModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell model for robot axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
]

instance SysMLModelingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for structural modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeFrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance SimulinkSimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink for simulation of friction models"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeFrictionModelIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyEnhancementService
]

instance MQTTStreamingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data streaming from sensors"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeFrictionModelIdentificationService, DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells for digital twin asset management"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tools for data presentation"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance RealTimeFrictionModelIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time identification of friction parameters using white-box and black-box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParametersIdentificationInsight
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization of simulated versus measured data for motion analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizedDeviationsInsight
]

instance MotionAccuracyEnhancementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous refinement of friction models to enhance motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlSystemAdjustmentAction
]

instance FrictionParametersIdentificationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identification of friction parameters for control system adjustment"
]

instance VisualizedDeviationsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualized deviations between simulated and measured data to inform motion accuracy improvements"
]

instance ControlSystemAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjustment of control system based on friction parameters"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SinumerikController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller providing position, speed, or acceleration inputs to the motor and gearboxes"
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor actuating rotational motion"
]

instance Gearwheel : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gearwheel component in the robot axis"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox in the robot axis"
]

instance RobotAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains SinumerikController, PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, Gearwheel, CycloidalGearbox, MotorPositionEncoder, SecondaryPositionEncoder, CurrentSensor
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "No interaction; digital shadow functions as a passive entity with one-way data flow from physical to virtual."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integration of sensor data via MQTT, processing through Simulink models, SysML structural models, AAS for asset description, and unified dashboard visualization for real-time friction analysis."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated phase, continuously updated with live operational data to account for wear, tool changes, and application variations."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for streaming sensor data from physical robot to digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell (AAS) standards for asset description and SysML for system modeling."
]
